channel.title: DOE on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in DOE on Alien Truth Social

item.title: FOIA Request on UAP Keywords Produces Minimal Results, Heavy Redactions, from Energy Department
item.description:
A Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request to the U.S. Department of Energy for communications regarding unidentified aerial phenomena (UAP) yielded only two partially released documents. These documents, internal DOE emails from May 2024, were prepared for Secretary Jennifer Granholm in advance of an oversight hearing. The emails reference attached briefing materials that included “UFO and UPA talking points” for congressional engagement. Despite the request’s broad scope, significant portions of the released documents were withheld under FOIA exemptions, preventing the disclosure of substantive content or internal analysis on UAP topics.

Source: https://www.theblackvault.com/documentarchive/foia-request-on-uap-keywords-produces-minimal-results-heavy-redactions-from-energy-department
